caption:
Save this for your next night out in Dubai! 🤩

This night time attraction is so magical!
📍 @dubaigardenglow Zabeel Park
🕔 Sunday to Friday 5 PM to 11 PM, 
Saturday & National Holidays 5 PM to 12 Midnight
🎟️ 69 AED: Regular Pack: access to Glow Park, Dinosaur Park and Art Park
🎟️ 109 AED: Combo Pack: access to regular attractions + Magic Park and Fantasy Park

Plan your visit now! Tag your family and friends!
